tasks.name: PDLDPM0 slice (code)
tasks.description: Implement PDLDPM0 persisted platform-metadata production changes.
acceptance_criteria: Production code implements the PDLDPM0 AC set.
Linux platform metadata persistence stays additive and formatter/lint gates pass.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/persist-detected-linux-distro-pkg-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, PDLDPM0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/persist-detected-linux-distro-pkg-manager" SLICE_ID="PDLDPM0"
end_checklist: Record a targeted baseline command before edits and rerun it after edits
cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="PDLDPM0-code"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: CP1 CI checkpoint (cross-platform validation)
tasks.description: Run compile parity, feature smoke, and CI Testing quick for checkpoint boundary slice PDLDPM2.
acceptance_criteria: CI audit ledger is created or updated for the checkpoint.
Compile parity is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA.
Feature smoke is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA on linux.
CI Testing quick is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/persist-detected-linux-distro-pkg-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read pre-planning/ci_checkpoint_plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Run ci_audit for ci-testing and feature-smoke; record audit output lines in session_log.md
Dispatch compile parity, CI Testing quick, and feature smoke per kickoff prompt; record run ids and URLs
Set status to completed; add END entry; commit docs

tasks.name: PDLDPM2 slice (integration linux)
tasks.description: Resolve PDLDPM2 Linux behavior-smoke failures reported by CP1.

Local quality gates for the Linux platform-fix worktree are green.

tasks.name: Feature cleanup
tasks.description: Remove retained triad worktrees after all slice integrations finish.
acceptance_criteria: All triad tasks are completed and merged as intended.
Cleanup records the script summary in session_log.md.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/persist-detected-linux-distro-pkg-manager && git pull --ff-only
Confirm all tasks are completed and merged as intended
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Run: make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/persist-detected-linux-distro-pkg-manager" DRY_RUN=1 REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1
Then run: make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/persist-detected-linux-distro-pkg-manager" REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1
Set status to completed; add END entry with the cleanup summary; commit docs
